pricing_conclusion: Hurdle prices are derived from the decision-grade universal contract; they do not constitute a capital decision.
falsifiers: A directly comparable transaction or asset-specific impairment supports a value below the low-case unit mark after like-for-like adjustments.
The next decision milestone fails, remaining capital rises materially, or the stated success probability no longer fits observable progress.
The next decision milestone fails, remaining capital rises materially, or the stated success probability no longer fits observable progress.
The obligation, financing claim, tax, or realization friction is materially larger than the low-case reserve.
